_schema_meta.source_document: Endorsement Cum Policy Schedule — Basanti Satapathy — Endorsement 001 dated 29/04/2026 — Correction in insured particulars
_schema_meta.notes: Updated after HDFC ERGO issued corrected schedule on 29/04/2026 following Ezer-generated schedule correction letter. Phantom third SI block removed. Two-block structure now correctly reflected. This is Ezer's first real-world outcome — schedule integrity error detected by engine, letter sent, correction received same day.

policy_meta.issuing_office: 2nd Floor, OSCU Complex, Samabaya Bhawan, Unit 9, Janpath, Khorda

sum_insured.multiplier_benefit_note: 10 years continuous coverage — Multiplier has reached 100% maximum on the original ₹10L. The enhanced ₹5L Multiplier will accrue over time.
sum_insured.per_claim_ceiling_note: Single claim cannot exceed Base SI + Multiplier Benefit = ₹30L.
sum_insured.effective_annual_coverage_note: Base ₹15L + Multiplier ₹15L + one Restore trigger ₹15L = ₹45L maximum across multiple claims in a policy year

waiting_periods.overall_status: partial — original ₹10L fully served, enhanced ₹5L has running waiting periods

specific_disease_24_month_waiting.reason: 10 years continuous coverage — 24 months fully served

ped_36_month_waiting.reason: 10 years continuous coverage — 36 months fully served

initial_30_day_waiting.reason: Continuous renewal — 30-day waiting waived per Section C.1.i

ped_36_month_waiting.ped_affected: Hypertension — waiting period on this ₹5L block expires approximately February 2028

schedule_integrity_flags.resolution: HDFC ERGO issued corrected Endorsement Cum Policy Schedule (Endorsement 001, Policy No. 2805207149369401001) on 29/04/2026. Phantom third SI block removed. Two-block structure now correctly reflected in issued schedule.
schedule_integrity_flags.description: The exclusion table in the original issued policy schedule showed THREE SI blocks — two ₹5L rows and one ₹10L row. Only one ₹5L enhancement was done in 25-26. The middle ₹5L block was an underwriting error with no corresponding real SI enhancement.
schedule_integrity_flags.correct_structure: ₹10L block — all waiting periods waived. ₹5L enhanced block — C1(i) waived, C1(ii) approximately 1 year remaining, C1(iii) approximately 2 years remaining.
schedule_integrity_flags.ezer_outcome: First real-world Ezer outcome. Schedule integrity error detected by Insight Engine. Correction letter generated by engine. Letter sent by user. Correction received same day.

original_10L.coverage_note: Fully covered on original ₹10L. Claimable today.

enhanced_5L.coverage_note: Hypertension claims on the enhanced ₹5L block are not claimable until approximately February 2028.

schedule_of_benefits.emergency_air_ambulance: Covered upto Rs. 2.5L per hospitalisation, maximum upto SI in a year
schedule_of_benefits.restore_benefit: 100% of Basic SI — for any illness or any insured person
schedule_of_benefits.multiplier_benefit: 50% of Basic SI post each policy year irrespective of claims, maximum 100%

special_conditions.waiting_period_waivers: Original ₹10L — all waiting periods fully waived. Enhanced ₹5L — C1(i) waived, C1(ii) and C1(iii) running.
